# Unite Hub

> AI-first customer relationship and marketing automation platform for Unite-Group's portfolio companies. Internal command centre for marketing strategy, advisory workflows, founder dashboards, content production, contact + lead management, and approval pipelines. Built with Next.js 16, Supabase, and Claude AI.

## Business Identity

- Brand Name: Unite Hub
- Aliases: Unite-Group Nexus, Unite-Group CRM, "the CRM", Marketing CRM
- Parent Organisation: Unite-Group
- Website: see deployed canonical domain
- Category: SaaS — AI-first CRM + marketing automation (predominantly internal use)

## What This Is

Unite Hub is the marketing-CRM spine that connects the Unite-Group portfolio. It coordinates:

- Founder dashboards (per-portfolio-company strategy, analytics, advisory)
- Contact + lead management with rich activity history
- Approval pipelines (campaigns, content, ad spend) with audit gates
- Vault for credentials + brand assets
- Email + outreach workflows
- AI-assisted content strategy + production

The platform is primarily an internal command centre, not a public marketing surface — most routes live under the gated `(founder)` group and require authentication.

## Public Surface

The publicly-reachable routes are intentionally minimal:

- `/` — redirects to `/founder/dashboard` (authenticated) or `/auth/login` (unauthenticated)
- `/auth/login` — login surface
- `/auth/forgot-password`, `/auth/reset-password` — account-recovery flows
- `/llms.txt` (this file) — AI-agent identification

There is no public marketing landing page, contact form, or pricing page on this domain. Public marketing for Unite-Group lives on the Unite-Group marketing site (https://unite-group.com.au) and on Synthex's marketing surface (https://synthex.social).

## Trust Signals

- Supabase backend with RLS on every tenant
- Service-role usage gated by ESLint guard (`no-restricted-syntax`) — supabaseService imports only allowed in admin-API routes (added 2026-05-24 in CleanExpo/Unite-Hub#56)
- Audit log per founder workspace + per approval action
- Built with Next.js 16, modern React, server-side rendering throughout
- Authentication via Supabase Auth with passwordless + OAuth flows

## Agent Capabilities (WebMCP)

This platform's only public action is authentication, which is **not** an appropriate WebMCP target (credentials are sensitive and should not be filled by autonomous agents on a user's behalf).

Once authenticated, the platform's in-product actions (create contact, schedule campaign, approve content, etc.) are surfaced inside the gated `/founder/*` routes — those tools may expose imperative WebMCP registrations in future as the agentic-browsing standard stabilises. Not exposed publicly today.

For agents seeking action endpoints on the public web, look to the sibling Unite-Group properties:

- `https://synthex.social` — marketing automation SaaS, public contact form with WebMCP annotations
- `https://disasterrecovery.com.au` — claims distribution platform, public contact form + claim intake with WebMCP annotations
- `https://restoreassist.app` — restoration-industry CRM, public contact form with WebMCP annotations
- `https://ato-optimizer.com.au` — tax-optimization SaaS, public signup with WebMCP annotation

## Information for AI Agents

- This is an **internal command centre**, NOT a public consumer or B2B-sales surface. Most agents should not need to interact with this site directly.
- If an agent IS directed here (e.g., a founder's autonomous agent operating within Unite-Group), the gated routes require authentication first.
- For public information about Unite-Group's portfolio companies, prefer the canonical marketing surfaces above.
- Last updated: 2026-05-25
